AI-Powered Chatbots & Virtual Assistants Smart, context-aware virtual assistants that streamline support, simplify onboarding, and boost internal efficiency. Built a chatbot for an e-commerce platform that handles FAQs, tracks orders, and escalates complex issues to human agents, reducing ticket volume by 40%.

Created an onboarding bot that guides new users through setup, resulting in a 25% increase in user activation rates. What platforms do your chatbots integrate with? Our chatbots integrate with Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce, Airtable, Google Workspace, Intercom, WhatsApp, Discord, Webflow, Typeform, and more.

How secure are your internal knowledge assistants? We deploy securely with SSO support and internal-only data access, ensuring your data stays private and protected. Autonomous AI agents that retrieve data, make decisions, and complete multi-step tasks with minimal human supervision.

Built an agent that scrapes competitor pricing weekly, updates Airtable, and notifies the team via Slack, saving 10 hours of manual work per week. Developed an agent that digests survey responses, flags pain points, and posts summaries to Notion, streamlining feedback analysis. What is an agentic workflow?

An agentic workflow involves AI agents that dynamically think through tasks, call multiple tools, and adapt based on retrieved data, with optional human oversight. How secure are these agents? Our agents are deployed in secure environments with audit trails and private data handling, ensuring your information remains protected.

Custom automations that connect your tools, streamline data processing, and eliminate repetitive tasks. Automated weekly investor updates by pulling data from multiple sources and compiling them into a polished report, saving 5 hours weekly. Built a system to route support tickets based on keywords and client priority, reducing response time by 30%.

What tools do you use for automation? We use Zapier, Make, n8n, Pipedream, Python, Pandas, REST APIs, and Webhooks, integrating with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, CRMs, and more. How do you ensure automation reliability?

We implement secure credential storage, custom logging, and fail-safe alerts to ensure your automations run smoothly and reliably. Lightweight AI Apps & Micro-SaaS Tools Fast, lean, and functional AI-powered apps and MVPs built to validate ideas or streamline operations.

Built an MVP that uploads PDFs and auto-summarizes key legal clauses, launched in 14 days. Developed a client portal where users input data and receive GPT-generated outreach scripts, integrated with Stripe for billing. How fast can you build an MVP?

We can deliver a fully functional MVP in 7–21 days, depending on complexity, with custom branding and hosting. What tech stack do you use for AI apps? We use Streamlit, Chainlit, FastAPI, Flask, LangChain, GPT-4 API, Pinecone, Supabase, Firebase, and HuggingFace, with integrations like Notion, Slack, and Stripe.

We create lean AI solutions that get to market quickly without sacrificing quality. Our AI systems integrate seamlessly with your existing tools and workflows. Solutions designed to grow efficiently alongside your business needs.

We prioritize security, privacy, and transparency in every AI solution we build. Evaluate your organization's readiness to implement AI solutions with this comprehensive 15-question assessment. Your AI Readiness Score

Ready to Take the Next Step? Based on your assessment results, we can help you create a customized AI implementation roadmap tailored to your organization's specific needs and readiness level. Get Your Personalized Roadmap

Do we have 1–2 measurable outcomes for AI in the next 90 days (e.g., \"deflect 40% FAQs\", \"reduce touches/shipment 30%\")? Have we identified our top repetitive processes (volume/month, SLA impact, handle time)? Is there a single high-impact process we're willing to pilot in 4 weeks?

Are policies/FAQs/docs centralized and current, and exportable (PDF/text/Notion/Drive)? Do we know where sensitive/PII data lives and the rules for handling/redaction? Can we access core tools via API or service accounts (e.g., HubSpot/Zendesk/Gmail/Sheets)?

Do we have sample data and test accounts for safe development/UAT? Are refusal rules (no medical/legal/financial advice, risky actions) and escalation paths defined? Can we log every agent/tool action with inputs/outputs (audit trail)?

Is an internal owner assigned (with time for reviews during both sprints)? Are success metrics agreed and easy to track (e.g., deflection %, first-response time, touches/shipment, speed-to-lead)? Have we selected 8–10 intents/actions to automate in Sprint 1?

Do we have a go-live comms & training plan for affected teams? Have we estimated LLM/voice costs and set quotas/rate limits to control spend? Are we comfortable with least-privilege access in vendor cloud, or do we prefer deployment in our cloud/VPC?

The Teeny Tech Trek Team No black boxes, just clean, understandable systems that make sense for your business. We integrate like a teammate, not a vendor, focusing on your goals and processes.
The tiny studio behind Teeny Tech Trek was founded in 2024 to prove that small, focused teams can ship real AI—chat, voice, and automations that pay back fast. Book 45-min strategy call

I started Teeny Tech Trek in 2024 with a stubborn belief: clarity beats complexity. Before TTT, I spent years straddling product, ops, and AI—seeing two patterns everywhere: teams drowning in repetitive work, and "AI projects" that looked great in slide decks but never reached production.

The first wins were scrappy: a support assistant that finally answered with receipts, a logistics workflow that routed exceptions before customers called, a voice concierge that booked property viewings after hours. Ship a small, reliable thing in 14 days, measure honestly, then iterate. That rhythm built trust, momentum, and results you could actually feel.
Founder & CEO of Teeny Tech Trek. We ship lean, reliable AI—chat, voice, and automations that plug into your tools and start paying back fast. Metrics are typical ranges from recent builds.
Actual impact varies by data quality, process, and adoption. Results shown represent real client outcomes but individual performance may differ. Ready to start your trek?
Book a ₹1,200 Starter Strategy Call or try the live demo. TTT is deliberately small. That lets us move fast, keep quality high, and stay close to your outcomes.
Build Small, Ship Fast Humans Stay in Control Empowering small teams with AI-driven solutions for big impact.

You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or use any part of our content without prior written permission. When you engage with Teeny Tech Trek for consulting, development, or digital services:

A separate proposal or agreement will define project scope, pricing, deliverables, and timelines. All services are offered on a best-effort basis, using commercially reasonable skill and care. We may use third-party tools (e.g., APIs, automation platforms) to deliver our solutions.

Payments for services are to be made as per agreed milestones or packages. Unless stated otherwise in writing, all payments are non-refundable. Delays in payment may lead to a pause or termination of the service.

We do not guarantee that the website or services will be error-free or uninterrupted. Our tools and automations are provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. You use our services at your own risk.

We connect it to your existing platforms We ensure it works perfectly We help you launch and maintain it

Platform-specific SDKs for seamless integration The Power of Agentic AI Agentic AI represents the next evolution in artificial intelligence - systems that can plan and execute multi-step tasks with minimal human supervision.
Break complex problems into manageable steps Coordinate between different specialized AI agents Adapt to changing conditions and requirements

Rapid Development, Real Results Our lightweight AI apps and micro-SaaS tools give you the benefits of custom software without the typical time and budget requirements. We focus on creating solutions that:
Solve a specific problem extremely well Can be developed and deployed in weeks, not months Are easy to use and require minimal training
Can evolve based on user feedback We select the right platform based on your specific needs: Perfect for data-focused applications with interactive visualizations and AI features.
Ideal for chat-based applications that leverage large language models. Great for building robust APIs and web applications that need more customization. Our micro-SaaS approach allows you to:
Launch quickly with core functionality Gather real user feedback Iterate based on actual usage data

Scale gradually as demand grows Expand features based on validated needs Context-aware GPT bots for customer support, onboarding, or internal tools — integrated with your existing platforms (Slack, Notion, CRMs, etc.)

Save hours by automating repetitive tasks with Python, APIs, Zapier, and Make.

From CRM updates to email replies — we connect your stack, end-to-end.
